details.note: Fix-A: Add desktop-plugin-config to RESERVED_STORE_NAMES, add isValidPluginConfigEntry/validateAndFilterPluginConfigs helpers, add get-desktop-plugin-config/set-desktop-plugin-config IPC handlers
Fix-B: Add 'desktop' to PluginKind union, update readV1Plugin with desktop validation and 3-way mutual exclusion
Fix-D: Add PluginConfigEntry type, type getDesktopPluginConfig properly, add setDesktopPluginConfig
Fix-D: Add .catch(() => undefined) and extract .configs from new return shape
Fix-C: Wire DesktopPluginProvider around PlatformProvider; Fix-H: Add useDialog import and menuTrigger handler for open-plugin-manager
Fix-G: Add 18 i18n keys for plugin management incl dataLossWarning and invalidEntries
Fix-I: 13 tests for isValidPluginConfigEntry (8) and validateAndFilterPluginConfigs (5)
Fix-E: Plugin browser/list dialog with toggle enable/disable, remove, and inline install form
Fix-F: Standalone install dialog with npm specifier/file path modes
